public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master.
appearance: Typically appears in the bright colors and tall plumes associated with Shelk’s Roadwardens.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Roadwardens Order, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Roadwardens Order workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around Roadwardens Order, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Tavian Dawnsilk may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Tavian Dawnsilk needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Roadwardens Order.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Deputy Master, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.

escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tavian Dawnsilk adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
